koch_snowflake.name: koch_snowflake
koch_snowflake.description: Script for generating and drawing the recursive koch snowflake fractal.

hand_tracking.name: hand_tracking
hand_tracking.description: Simple camera hand tracker using a pre-trained model, with a matplotlib 3D plot visualising the position of landmark points.

cube_rendered_in_terminal.name: cube_rendered_in_terminal
cube_rendered_in_terminal.description: First project in C, learning about rasterization, z-buffer and surface normals by making a 3D cube spin in the terminal via ANSI escape codes.

quill.name: quill
quill.description: An imitation of the minecraft rendering engine to serve as an integrated editor and previewer for texturepacks, created by reverse engineering the minecraft rendering engine and its use of .json files to store block models.

png_utils.name: png_utils
png_utils.description: A simple PNG encoder/decoder header file, for loading small 8-bit images in other rendering projects. Learning more about C++ and the PNG specification through this project.

axist.name: axist
axist.description: 2D/3D graph/function renderer made with OpenGL and ImGUI

obsidian-sequencer.name: obsidian-sequencer
obsidian-sequencer.description: Obsidian plugin for organising notes in a sequence and navigating through the sequence.

roots.name: roots
roots.description: Collaborative family tree tracking using D3 graphs instead of the traditional tree structure.

labyrinth.name: labyrinth
labyrinth.description: Framework for publishing my obsidian notes. Made with Astro and Remark/Rehype. Supports math rendering with MathJax/TikZJax and syntax highlighting with Shiki.

euler-ml.name: euler-ml
euler-ml.description: Categorise things with a visual euler/venn diagram using markup style code.

obsidian-symbol-mapper.name: obsidian-symbol-mapper
obsidian-symbol-mapper.description: Search for UTF-8 special characters using your own keywords.

protocol-ml.name: protocol-ml
protocol-ml.description: Markup language for rendering network protocol diagrams.

linasm.name: linasm
linasm.description: Single header linear algebra library with computations implemented with inline assembly.

spase.name: spase
spase.description: Simple API that aggregates space events such as CMEs and solar flares, hosted on github pages, updated daily using github actions.

microtube.name: microtube
microtube.description: Break your youtube addiction by limiting your feed to a curated set of channels.

brick-index.name: brick-index
brick-index.description: Bloomberg terminal style price tracker for LEGO minifigures.

wave.name: wave
wave.description: Ocean wave simulator as a practical self-directed learning tool to help students understand the fast fourier transform. Built for CS2108 project.
